overview: Based on the published agenda, the Kronenwetter Parks Committee was scheduled to meet to discuss updates on the Buska Park Renovation Project, consider grant funding opportunities, and review plans for multiple community fundraising events scheduled for late summer 2026.

agenda.item: Approval of June 29, 2026 Parks Committee Meeting Minutes
Wausau & Marathon County Parks & Recreation Foundation Fund Grant
August 21, 2026 Concert at Towering Pine Fundraiser Event
September 12, 2026 Buska Park 5K Run/Walk Fundraiser Event
Creating a "Friends of the Kronenwetter Parks" Support Group

discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to receive an update on the status of the Buska Park Renovation Project. This item was set to inform committee members of project progress and any relevant developments related to the park improvements.

discussions.item: Wausau & Marathon County Parks & Recreation Foundation Fund Grant
discussions.body: The committee was expected to consider a grant opportunity from the Wausau & Marathon County Parks & Recreation Foundation. This item was set to discuss potential funding and application details for the Village's parks initiatives.
The committee was scheduled to discuss a post village parks tour. Details regarding the nature, timing, and scope of this tour were set for committee consideration.

discussions.item: August 21, 2026 Concert at Towering Pine Fundraiser Event
discussions.body: The committee was expected to review plans for a concert fundraiser event scheduled for August 21, 2026 at Towering Pine. This item was set to address event logistics, coordination, and related details.

discussions.item: September 12, 2026 Buska Park 5K Run/Walk Fundraiser Event
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to discuss an upcoming 5K run/walk fundraiser planned for September 12, 2026 at Buska Park. This item was set to address event planning and coordination for the community fundraising event.

discussions.item: Creating a "Friends of the Kronenwetter Parks" Support Group
discussions.body: The committee was expected to consider the establishment of a "Friends of the Kronenwetter Parks" support group. This item was set to discuss the formation, purpose, and structure of a community volunteer organization to support local parks.

publicComment: Public comment was on the agenda for a maximum of 15 minutes total, with a three-minute time limit per person, subject to extension at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion.
actionItems: Scheduled to approve or consider June 29, 2026 meeting minutes
Expected to receive and discuss Buska Park Renovation Project update
Set to consider application or acceptance of Wausau & Marathon County Parks & Recreation Foundation Fund Grant
Scheduled to discuss post village parks tour plans
Expected to coordinate August 21, 2026 Concert at Towering Pine fundraiser event
Set to coordinate September 12, 2026 Buska Park 5K Run/Walk fundraiser event
Expected to consider creation of "Friends of the Kronenwetter Parks" support group
title: Parks Committee - 2026-07-20
